link.title: CnSight®: Cyber Risk management Platform | TDI

meta.name: description
meta.content: CnSight® is designed to help companies better understand & take meaningful steps to improve cybersecurity. Learn more at TDI Solutions!
CnSight®: Cyber Risk management Platform | TDI
CnSight® is designed to help companies better understand & take meaningful steps to improve cybersecurity. Learn more at TDI Solutions!

div.h5: Actionable Insights to Effectively Manage the Business of Cyber
div.p: CnSight®, TDI’s CPM platform, mitigates risk, improves ROI, and provides continuous compliance & cyber visibility to ensure mission-critical cyber outcomes – the result: reduced stress, better performance, less cost, and a true understanding of cyber investment.

div.div: Use Our Out Of The Box And Key Tailorable Cybersecurity Performance Indicators (Cpis / Cyber Kpis)
div.h2: See What Other Systems Miss, And Never Get Caught Off Guard

p.p: As a leader in your organization, stay informed of the most important cybersecurity metrics and their impact to business risk, readily seeing performance against established goals.
Baseline your organization and monitor effectiveness over time as you introduce changes to people, processes, and tools aimed at improving your security posture.
Use security performance data to baseline and inform your strategy and roadmap as your program grows in maturity. Effectively communicate cybersecurity posture to the CIO and board.
We improve what you already have by taking advantage of your existing security investments-seamlessly integrate without the need for expensive professional services to configure and maintain.
With quick install and setup, you can immediately see your blind spots across your asset inventory and security patching processes.
Quickly see what’s not working and needs to be fixed to streamline workflows while eliminating the need for manual data sources and reliance on the individuals who maintain and distribute them.

div.h2: A New CPM Solution With A Long History

div.p: CnSight® is powered by TDI, one of the longest practicing cybersecurity firms in the field. We’ve taken our half a million hours plus of experience across defense, intelligence, and commercial markets to develop a solution to an all too common problem. TDI has been on the forefront of cybersecurity performance management (CPM), having first created the concept in 2017. It’s extremely validating and humbling as we continue to lead the CPM category which Gartner began to recognize in their Hype Cycle for Cyber and IT Risk Management, 2021. Cybersecurity fundamentals are taking a back seat to daily fire drills, data calls, and IT transformation initiatives.

We get it, budgets are stretched, top talent is hard to come by, and if you’re lucky to have some of the 3,000+ tools on the market, chances are you are you’re still not getting the insights into your security program you need to be successful. See more and increase effectiveness – Our lightweight platform is designed to be low-touch, keeping your organization in sync and abreast of the effectiveness of your cybersecurity efforts by offering relevant and actionable insights to drive increased maturity.

div.div: Trusted by the Clients we Serve – Two Decades of Experience and Insights

div.h2: Get ahead of the curve with Cybersecurity Performance Management, exclusively from CnSight®!

blockquote.p:
After 20 some years of talk around the value of cybersecurity metrics, CnSight finally makes it practical and easy to implement and realize immediate ROI.
Lee Washington, President & CEO, VIATEQ Corporation

Even when using industry spending benchmarks and risk-based prioritization frameworks, organizations are not adding performance into their risk equation. CnSight fills this critical gap.
Viraj Gandhi, CEO, Paradyme Management

The next evolution of cybersecurity is measuring and maximizing cybersecurity performance. TDI and CnSight are clear thought leaders in this emerging space.
Paul Burke, CEO, Definitive Logic

div.h2: Your Cyber Need To Know, In No Time

p.p: Designed for quick deployment, setup, and integration, no professional services required.
View one executive-centric enterprise dashboard for continuous visibility into data across disparate teams and tools, bridging the gap between security operations and the business.
Increase team efficiency and free staff from manual reporting, tracking down spreadsheets so they can focus on improving security.
No agents needed to install and the platform is built on a microservices architecture for maximum efficiency and scalability.
Flexible deployment options, choose what makes sense to you.
It’s your data, we make integration with your other systems easy.

div.p: Watch a quick video to see cybersecurity performance management in action and why it’s the future!
Speak with us about how we may improve the future of cyber together.

p.p:
1718 Connecticut Avenue NW Suite 350
Washington, DC 20009 Get Directions
